Name: Jasper BRD Events
Description: General-purpose Bard event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Warden's Paean (Self)
Events.Description: Cleanses self when Warden's Paean can help.

Events.Name: Warden's Paean (Party)
Events.Description: Cleanses party members when Warden's Paean can help.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Bard ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Bard ACR toggles while safely out of combat.
